piano_keyboard.title: Open the Trinity grade book and set up the music stand
Check seating posture and verify hand positioning (curved fingers)
2 minutes of gentle finger stretching and wrist rotations
Play a simple 5-finger warm-up pattern up and down twice
Run through the current weekly technical scale with a metronome
Practice a specific 4-bar challenging section slowly 3 times
Play through your main Trinity exam piece from start to finish
Spend 1 minute sight-reading a brand new 2-bar melodic phrase
Listen to a professional recording of your grade piece for phrasing
Close the keyboard dust cover neatly to protect the keys

guitar.title: Tune all 6 strings perfectly using a digital tuner app
Verify proper sitting posture and fret-hand thumb positioning
2 minutes of chromatic finger exercises (1-2-3-4 walking drill)
Practice switching smoothly between two difficult chords for 1 minute
Run through the weekly scale at a controlled, slow tempo
Loop a challenging 2-bar rhythm or strumming pattern with a click
Play through the assigned section of your Trinity grade piece
Spend 1 minute isolating a tricky riff or solo passage cleanly
Clean the strings with a dry microfiber cloth to prevent rust
Place the guitar safely back on its stand or inside its gig bag

drums.title: Adjust drum throne height and verify structural foot pedal placement
Check stick grip relaxation and execute 10 slow practice pad rebounds
2 minutes of single-stroke rolls (RLRL) to a steady metronome
2 minutes of double-stroke rolls (RRLL) focusing on even volume
Practice the assigned weekly rudiment (e.g., Paradiddles) for 2 minutes
Run through your current limb-independence coordination drill slowly
Play along to the target Trinity groove track or standard click
Spend 1 minute practicing dynamic control (moving quiet to loud)
Air-drum or mentally map out the arrangement of your performance track
Wipe down the snare/pad and store your drumsticks in their bag

violin.title: Apply rosin to the bow hairs cleanly from frog to tip
Tune all 4 strings meticulously using a fine-tuner app
Check shoulder rest placement and adjust jaw/chin comfort alignment
2 minutes of open-string bowing drills targeting a straight bow path
Practice a finger-placement shifting or left-hand intonation exercise
Play through the current weekly scale, focusing on pristine intonation
Isolate and repeat a specific 2-bar difficult bow-crossing pattern
Play your full Trinity exam piece with deep focus on expression
Gently wipe rosin dust off the violin body and strings with a soft cloth
Loosen the bow hair completely before packing it safely away

vocals_classical.title: Sip a glass of lukewarm water to properly hydrate the vocal folds
Spend 1 minute practicing deep, steady diaphragmatic breathing
Do gentle jaw-relaxation stretches and hummed lip trills to warm up
Practice singing a steady, sustained 'Sa' to lock onto the tanpura drone
Run through basic vocal patterns (Sarali Varisai / Alankars) at slow speed
Repeat basic vocal patterns at medium and fast speeds with clean pitch
Isolate a specific complex phrasing, Sangati, or Taan passage slowly
Sing through the assigned composition with accurate talam / steady rhythm
Record a 30-second audio clip of your singing to listen back for tone
Commit to avoiding cold drinks for the next 30 minutes to protect your voice
